chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: In today's video, we will see the methods of tuples that you can apply on tuples to manipulate them.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: We are going to see a lot of things in this video.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Let's go to the computer screen and let's get started.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Intro

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Now see, when we talked about the list, we talked about the list methods.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: We said that we can manipulate the list like this.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Can we manipulate tuples?

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Not in a direct way.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: If you want to change a tuple, if you want to add a value in the tuple or if you want to remove a value,

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: then there is no direct method to do this.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: You have to copy it and make a list.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: You will have to make changes in the list and change it again in the tuple.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Because the point of tuples is that you should not be able to change it.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: If there are 5 items in it, then there will be only 5.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: The sixth item cannot be added.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: But now we are going to see here that what are the methods of tuples.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Because they tell you how many elements are in the tuple.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: They give you information about it.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So tuples are immutable.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: As we saw, if you want to add, remove or change tuple items,

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: then first you must convert the list to a tuple.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: And after that, you can add, remove and change it here.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: And after that, you can convert that list back to a tuple.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: I have taken a very good example here, which I want you to see.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: One tuple is made here.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: I made a temporary list.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: After that, I appended Russia in it.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Then I did pop.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: I used a pop method of the list.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: And after that, I made some changes in that list.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: And finally, I converted it back to a tuple.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So this way you can change the tuple indirectly but not directly.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: You guys keep this in mind.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Now see here that we can convert the tuple to a list.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Manipulate items and convert it back to a tuple.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: However, we can directly concatenate two tuples without converting them to a list.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Because we are making a new tuple.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: We are not changing an existing tuple.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: We are making a new tuple.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So when we are concatenating two tuples, a new third tuple is being made.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So it is made.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So if you see this example,

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: I am overwriting the examples because they are already here.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: You can copy and run it yourself.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So see here, what we did is we merged these two.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So the names of these countries and the names of these countries

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: are merged again and a new tuple is made.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So this way we can look.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Now there are some methods of tuple which you guys should know.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Like this is a count method which tells how many occurrences of a given thing are there in a list.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Now see here, I made a tuple with the name tuple1.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: I will make it small because we use capital for classes.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: This thing is not important now but you will get to know in object-oriented programming.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: I will make it small t.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Nothing will happen by doing this but again we use a convention

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: that we write the classes with capital

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: and our variables are written with small letters.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So see, 3 times are coming.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: That's why I got to see 3 here.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: That tuple1.count3, 3 is coming.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: If I add one more 3, then 4 will come.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: All the occurrences of 3, how many times 3 is coming in this tuple.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So here 4 times are coming so 4 is coming.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: As simple as that.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: I hope you guys understood something.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Now index method does exactly the same.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: What it does is it will return first occurrences of the given element from the tuple.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Now what is here is it raises value error if the element is not in the tuple.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So you guys keep this in mind.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So if I do something like this,

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: I will say res is equal to tuple1.index

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: and after that I will do 3.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So the first occurrence of 3, 0, 1, 2, 3 which is 3,

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: we will get to see that.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: If I make it 31, then what will happen?

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: We will get to see 5 because it is coming on the 5th index.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So we got to see 5.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So you guys should know this thing.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Now there is one more thing in this.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: I got occurrence of 3.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: As I know there are many occurrences of 3 here.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: I want to see in this portion only what is the index of 3.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So what I will do is I will say that I will give starting first.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Suppose I give 3 starting and after that I give ending.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: I will do one thing. I will make it 4 and 7 or 8.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: And after that I want to see what is the index of 3.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So first of all it will do slicing of this tuple 4 to 8.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Now it is saying x is not in tuple.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: In fact I made a mistake.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: 3 will come in starting.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So what it will do?

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: It will do slicing of tuple by 4 colon 8.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So when it will do slicing of tuple by 4 colon 8,

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: then what will happen?

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, then after that 5, 6, 7.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So this thing will come in 4 colon 8.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So here see what will be the occurrence of 3?

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Here you see what will be the index of 3?

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Here it will be 5.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So in original tuple 3 is coming on 5th index.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So we got to see 5.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: If I make it 31 then what will happen?

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Then we will not get to see 5.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Then we will get to see 7.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So will we get to see 7?

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Yes, because it is coming on 7th index.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Index is 7.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So it is coming here.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So we will get to see 7.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So you will use index method directly a lot in your life.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: This one, the start and end variation,

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: you may use it.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: You will use this one the most.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: But again I have told you how it works.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Okay.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Keep in mind that value error will be raised

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: if the element is not in tuple.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: Like if I do something like this,

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: So it will raise a value error.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
chunks.text: then you can do all the changes you want to do.

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python

chunks.title: Operations on Tuples in Python
